name: Plasto-Cargal Group Ltd
summary: Plasto-Cargal Group Ltd engages in the packaging business in Israel and internationally. The company offers cardboard and wood packaging products; triplex containers; sheets; and various paper-based products. It also provides printing services for corrugated cardboards. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Lod, Israel. Plasto-Cargal Group Ltd is a subsidiary of C.I. - Cardboard Industries Ltd.
